headline: Mizuho Cuts PT on Intuit Inc. (INTU) to $600 From $675
summary: Intuit Inc. (NASDAQ:INTU) is one of the best stocks with huge upside potential to buy according to Reddit. Mizuho cut the price target on Intuit Inc. (NASDAQ:INTU) to $600 from $675 on March 2, reiterating an Outperform rating on the shares and telling investors that it updated its model after the fiscal Q2 report. The […]

headline: The Trade Desk, Circle, And Venture Global Are Among the Top 10 Large-Cap Gainers Last Week (March 2-March 6): Are the Others in Your Portfolio?
summary: These large-cap gainers climbed last week on upbeat earnings, stronger guidance, analyst support, deal and buyback news, and sector-specific momentum in energy, ad tech and software.
